requirement_topic.en: EAEU Low-Voltage Safety and IEC 62109 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器EAEU低压安全及IEC 62109证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器EAEU低壓安全及IEC 62109證據

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan is an EAEU member state, so solar PV inverters placed on the Kyrgyzstan market may need EAEU conformity assessment under TR CU 004/2011 on low-voltage equipment when the product falls within the voltage and product scope. EAC marking should be applied only after all applicable EAEU technical regulations are satisfied, including EMC where relevant. For the technical safety baseline, local counterparties and project owners may also request IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 evidence for power converters used in photovoltaic systems, together with Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC documentation and manuals in the required language set.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU成员国，因此投放吉尔吉斯斯坦市场的太阳能光伏逆变器在落入电压和产品范围时，可能需要按TR CU 004/2011低压设备安全技术法规进行EAEU符合性评价。只有在满足所有适用EAEU技术法规后才应加施EAC标志，包括适用时的EMC要求。作为技术安全基线，当地合作方和项目业主还可能要求光伏系统用功率变换器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2证据，以及Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC文件和所需语言的说明书。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU成員國，因此投放吉爾吉斯斯坦市場的太陽能光伏逆變器在落入電壓和產品範圍時，可能需要按TR CU 004/2011低壓設備安全技術法規進行EAEU符合性評價。只有在滿足所有適用EAEU技術法規後才應加施EAC標誌，包括適用時的EMC要求。作為技術安全基線，當地合作方和項目業主還可能要求光伏系統用功率轉換器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2證據，以及Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC文件和所需語言的說明書。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU EAC marking and conformity assessment rules for products in technical-regulation scope
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence where applicable

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, NB/T 32004 technical specifications, manufacturer safety testing, and IEC 62109 reports for export projects. These documents are useful for due diligence but do not replace EAEU TR CU 004/2011 conformity assessment, EAC technical-file obligations, or Kyrgyzstandart / project-owner documentation requests in Kyrgyzstan.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB/T 37408-2021作为光伏并网逆变器技术要求，并结合NB/T 32004技术规范、制造商安全测试及出口项目中的IEC 62109报告。这些文件可用于尽调，但不能替代吉尔吉斯斯坦所需的EAEU TR CU 004/2011符合性评价、EAC技术文件义务，或Kyrgyzstandart/项目业主文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB/T 37408-2021作為光伏併網逆變器技術要求，並結合NB/T 32004技術規範、製造商安全測試及出口項目中的IEC 62109報告。這些文件可用於盡調，但不能替代吉爾吉斯斯坦所需的EAEU TR CU 004/2011符合性評價、EAC技術文件義務，或Kyrgyzstandart/項目業主文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: A Chinese GB/T or IEC safety report does not by itself authorize sale or installation in Kyrgyzstan. The gap is EAEU procedure, applicant responsibility, EAC marking, technical-file control, accepted test evidence, translation, model-family coverage, local manuals, and site-specific safety evidence for altitude, cold starts, enclosure rating, grounding, and surge protection.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T或IEC安全报告本身并不授权在吉尔吉斯斯坦销售或安装。差距在于EAEU程序、申请人责任、EAC标志、技术文件控制、可接受测试证据、翻译、型号系列覆盖、本地说明书，以及针对海拔、低温启动、外壳防护等级、接地和浪涌保护的场址特定安全证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T或IEC安全報告本身並不授權在吉爾吉斯斯坦銷售或安裝。差距在於EAEU程序、申請人責任、EAC標誌、技術文件控制、可接受測試證據、翻譯、型號系列覆蓋、本地說明書，以及針對海拔、低溫啟動、外殼防護等級、接地和浪湧保護的場址特定安全證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment scope; IEC 62109 / Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence may also be mandatory under project-owner, tender, lender, or grid-connection specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific for GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004; IEC 62109 evidence is commonly used for export but is not a substitute for the EAEU/EAC route where that route applies

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat TR CU 004/2011 scope and EAC documentation as a genuine Kyrgyzstan market-access gate for in-scope PV inverters; do not rely on GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or IEC 62109 reports alone. Confirm model-family coverage, local applicant responsibility, manuals, marking, and any Kyrgyzstandart or project-owner IEC 62109 evidence before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于落入范围的光伏逆变器，应将TR CU 004/2011适用范围和EAC文件视为吉尔吉斯斯坦真实市场准入门槛；不要仅依赖GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或IEC 62109报告。出货前请确认型号系列覆盖、本地申请人责任、说明书、标志，以及任何Kyrgyzstandart或项目业主要求的IEC 62109证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於落入範圍的光伏逆變器，應將TR CU 004/2011適用範圍和EAC文件視為吉爾吉斯斯坦真實市場准入門檻；不要僅依賴GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或IEC 62109報告。出貨前請確認型號系列覆蓋、本地申請人責任、說明書、標誌，以及任何Kyrgyzstandart或項目業主要求的IEC 62109證據。
